title: Huawei USG — NAT source with security-policy

source.description: NAT source PAT with address pool, security zones (trust/untrust), security-policy permitting outbound and blocking inbound

config.description: NAT source PAT with address pool, trust/untrust zones, security policies for outbound permit and inbound deny

expected_translation.high_level: Cisco ASA equivalent with object network, nat (inside,outside), implicit security-level-based ACL (no explicit access-list needed)

verification.notes: manual review because capability gap — Huawei security-policy + nat policy must be mapped to ASA's implicit security-level model (no explicit ACL). LLM must drop security-policy entirely and produce object network + nat (inside,outside). Genuine semantic transformation risk.
